name: Thomas Heverin
bio: Dr. Thomas Heverin serves as the Director of Technology and Cybersecurity & AI Educator at The Baldwin School. He holds over a decade of experience in cybersecurity, penetration testing, and AI security research. He has published multiple papers with his students at the Baldwin School (an all-girls private school) on topics including prompt injection attacks, AI security, ontology-driven cybersecurity, and vulnerabilities in enterprise technologies. He is also the author of a Navy cyber risk assessment patent, a NVD CVE entry, exploits in ExploitDB, Google Dorks, and countless bug bounty reports for universities and government agencies.
